response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer (15+ years, polyglot, strong testing/craftsmanship culture, some high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), but the profile does not match the core of this Principal IC6 role. There is no evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated principal-level scope such as leading multi-team initiatives or building platforms adopted across an organization. Career trajectory is solidly senior/staff at small-to-mid companies rather than systemic-platform leadership at enterprise scale.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded, with strong TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Recent AI-tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the central requirement of the role
No evidence of principal-level scope: multi-workstream leadership, cross-team platform adoption, or org-wide architectural influence
Limited metrics/telemetry infrastructure and statistical analysis background; data aptitude requirement is unaddressed

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale experience
